# Doctor's Regalia Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.

## Card Benefits and Features
Travel Benefits
  * 12 complimentary access per calendar year within India (both at domestic and international terminals)
  * Apply for Priority Pass for self and add-on members once you complete minimum 4 retail transactions.
  * Use Priority Pass to avail up to 6 Complimentary Lounge Access per calendar year, outside India.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Dining Delights
  * Exclusive complimentary Dineout Passport Membership.
  * Assured flat 25% off at 2000+ premium restaurants
  * 1+1 on buffet at 200+ restaurants


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * As part of our elite circle, you enjoy world-class privileges and great saving opportunities.
  * 4 reward points on ₹ 150, on all retail* spends including Insurance, Utilities, Education and Rent Pay.
  * Enjoy foreign currency mark up of 2% on all your foreign currency spends.
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India on transactions between ₹400 and ₹5000.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
Insurance Benefits
  * Protection worth up to ₹ 20 Lakh* against costs arising due to professional negligence.
  * Accidental air death cover worth ₹ 1 Crore
  * Emergency overseas hospitalisation up to ₹ 15 lakhs in case of emergency.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know More About The Card
  1. ### MyCards
  2. ### Other Benefits
  3. ### Airport Lounge Access
  4. ### Rewards Programme
  5. ### Travel Services
  6. ### Insurance Cover
  7. ### Contactless Payment Technology
  8. ### Fees & Charges
  9. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)**,** a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Regalia Gold Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Welcome Renwal Bonus](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Other Benefits 
**Dining Benefit**
  * Additional 5% off and ₹0 Convenience fee.


  * Early access to events and festivals such as Gourmetlicious*


[Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card/pdfs/dining-benefits.pdf) for details.
NOTE: Dineout Passport Membership will not be applicable after 31st Dec,2021
**Annual Spends Benefits**
  * Earn Bonus 10,000 Reward Points when you spend ₹ 5 lakhs in the anniversary year.


  * Earn additional 5,000 Reward Points when you spend ₹ 8 lakhs in the anniversary year


Please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card/pdfs/milestone-benefits.pdf) to know more
![Welcome Renwal Bonus](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Airport Lounge Access 
  * **Priority Pass Membership**


You can apply for Priority Pass for self and add on members once you complete minimum 4 retail transactions on your HDFC Bank Doctor's Regalia Credit Card. [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_Regalia_Priority_Pass1/Regalia_Priority_Pass.aspx) to apply.
[Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card/pdfs/exclusive-benefits.pdf) to check the list of lounges
Using Priority Pass, you and your add on member can together avail up to 6 Complimentary Lounge Access per calendar year, outside India. 
If you exceed the 6 Complimentary visits, you will be charged at US $27 + GST per visit 
Please note: Priority Pass in India will attract charges on your Credit Card. [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card/pdfs/priority-pass.pdf) to know more. You can visit [www.prioritypass.com(opens in a new tab)](https://www.prioritypass.com/) for list of lounge details.
To know about your lounge access history
Please write a mail to pp@prioritypass.com.hk. Please provide name, complete 18 digit Priority Pass number and state that PP Membership is via HDFC Bank program. If there is more than 1 Priority Pass number (belonging to add on PP holders), then please provide all the PP Numbers.
  * **Visa/Mastercard Lounge Access Program**


Complimentary Airport Lounge Access within India
  * 12 complimentary access per calendar year within India (both at domestic and international terminals) using the HDFC Bank Doctor's Regalia Credit Card


  * Swipe your Doctor's Regalia Credit Card at the lounge to avail the complimentary lounge access


  * Visits exceeding the complimentary quota will be allowed at the discretion of lounge and will also be chargeable by the lounge


![Fuel Surcharge Waiver](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Rewards Programme 
  * Regalia Reward Points: You earn 4 reward points on ₹ 150, on all retail* spends including Insurance, Utilities, Education and Rent Pay.


**Best in Class Redemption Program for:**
  * Flight and Hotel Bookings


  * Premium Products & Vouchers


  * Curated Global Experiences


For Flight and hotel bookings Regalia Credit card members can redeem up to maximum of 70% of booking value through Reward Points. Rest will have to be paid via Credit Card. This will be effective from 25.11.2019 
**Terms and Conditions:**
  * Only valid Retail purchases qualify for Reward points


  * Reward points will not be accrued for fuel transactions


  * Reward points are valid only for 2 years from the date of accumulation.   
E.g.: If you have received reward points in the month of April 2019, then same will expire in April 2021.   



  * EasyEMI and e-wallet loading transactions will not accrue Reward points.


  * Reward points accrued will be reversed if a retail transaction is converted into SmartEMI.


  * If the Credit Card is not used for more than 365 days, Reward Points accrued will be nullified.


  * Reward points accrued for Insurance transactions will have a maximum cap of 2,000 per day


![Key Image](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Travel Services 
  * **Travel Concierge Services**


Travel Concierge – 24 X 7   
You can customise your travel, shopping and business experiences with our Concierge Assistance   
Toll Free No.: 1860 425 1188   
Email ID: regalia.support@smartbuyoffers.co
  * **EXCLUSIVE TRAVEL PORTAL**


Unleash the power of your Reward Points like never before on <https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/regalia>[(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/regalia) , an exclusive portal for Regalia credit cardholders.
You can choose to redeem your Reward Points instantly against: 
  * Airline ticket booking 


  * Hotel booking


Each Reward Point is worth 50 paise when redeemed on <https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/regalia>[(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/regalia)
![Welcome Renwal Bonus](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Insurance Cover 
**Professional Indemnity Insurance**
Doctor's Regalia Credit Card provides you protection worth up to ₹ 20 Lakh* against costs arising due to professional negligence   
  
This policy covers:   
• Bodily injury and / or death of any patient caused by error, omission or negligence in professional service rendered   
•Legal costs and Defence expenses
*Any One Accident: ₹ 4 Lakh & Deductible: ₹ 25,000 for each & every claim
Note: This benefit is applicable w.e.f. 1st Sept'19 only.
For more details on policy, [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfcbank.com/content/api/contentstream-id/723fb80a-2dde-42a3-9793-7ae1be57c87f/fc57ca65-a7b6-4b06-8278-289692d265fe)
**Comprehensive Protection**
  * Accidental air death cover worth ₹ 1 Crore 


  * Emergency overseas hospitalisation up to ₹ 15 lakhs in case of emergency 


  * Credit Liability cover of up to ₹ 9,00,000


[Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://leads.hdfcbank.com/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx?_ga=2.26251124.810244122.1556024278-537237991.1553082495) to update your nominee details.   
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card/pdfs/lounge.pdf) to view policy
![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment Technology 
The HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card is enabled for contactless payments, facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets.   
*To see if your card is contactless, look for the contactless symbol network on your Card. 
You can use your card to make quick transactions at merchant locations accepting contactless cards.
Please note that in India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹ 5000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹ 5000, the card holder has to enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons.
![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * First Year Membership Fee – ₹ 2500/- + Applicable Taxes, Renewal Membership Fee – ₹ 2500/- + Applicable Taxes


  * Welcome Benefit of 2500 Reward Points and renewal benefit of 2500 Reward Points (applicable only after the membership fee is realised and not applicable when the fee is waived off)* Terms & Conditions Apply


  * Spend ₹ 3L in 12 Months and get Renewal Fee waived for next renewal year.


Please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfcbank.com/content/api/contentstream-id/723fb80a-2dde-42a3-9793-7ae1be57c87f/1b30c4ae-06ad-4270-bf05-f25774189a3a) to view the fees and charges applicable on your Regalia Credit Card.
**NOTE:** For card sourced starting 01-11- 2020, Below T&Cs are applicable 
1. The Bank reserves the right to cancel the Card in case the Card remains inactive and is not used for effecting any transaction for a continuous period of 6 (Six) months after prior written notice sent on the email address and/or phone number and/or communication address, registered in the records of the Bank
**Goods and Services Tax (GST)**
  * Effective 1st July 2017 Service Tax , KKC & SBC of 15% is replaced by Goods&Service Tax (GST) at 18%


  * The applicable GST would be dependent on place of provision (POP) and place of supply (POS).If POP and POS(Point of Scale) is in the same state then applicable GST would be CGST and SGST/UTGST else, IGST.


  * GST For FEE & Charges / Interest transactions Billed on statement date will reflect in next month statement.


  * GST levied will not be reversed on Any dispute on Fee & Charges / interest.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-regalia-credit-card/pdfs/june-tnc.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is the credit limit of the Doctor’s Regalia Card?
The credit limit for a Doctor's Regalia Credit Card is determined based on various factors such as your income, credit history, and repayment capacity. Eligible individuals can enjoy a high credit limit tailored to their needs.
###  What are the documents required to apply for the Doctor’s Regalia Card?
The documents required to apply for the Doctor's Regalia Credit Card include identity proof (such as Aadhaar card and PAN card), address proof (such as utility bills or passport), and income proof (such as salary slips or income tax returns).
###  Does the Doctor’s Regalia Card have lounge access?
Yes, the Doctor's Regalia Credit Card provides lounge access privileges. You can enjoy unlimited airport lounge access to 1000 plus lounges in India for both primary and add-on card members.
###  What are the benefits of the Doctor’s Regalia Credit Card?
  * Indulge in luxury with world-class privileges.
  * Enjoy **_exclusive benefits_** designed specifically for doctors.
  * Earn reward points on all your spends.
  * Get cashback offers and special discounts.


###  How to apply for the Doctor’s Regalia Credit Card?
  * Check your eligibility online 
  * Apply for **_Doctor’s Regalia Credit Card online_** through the HDFC Bank website
  * Submit the required documents
  * Upon approval, receive your Doctor's Regalia Credit Card


###  What is a Doctor’s Regalia Card?
The Doctor's Regalia Credit Card is an exclusive **_premium card_** designed for doctors, offering luxurious travel, exclusive benefits and a best-in-class rewards program.
